title: Error: Illegal assignment of constant to unpacked array

features.name: parameter unpacked array access in generate continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a parameter unpacked array accessed via index variables within a generate block, used in a continuous assignment comparison

features.name: localparam unpacked array initialized by function return
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array that is initialized by calling a function which returns an unpacked array type

features.name: nested generate loops accessing parameter unpacked array
features.description: Code should include nested generate loops accessing a parameter unpacked array with computed indices involving subtraction and multiplication
